# SparrowDB — docs directory

Documentation for SparrowDB, a graph-vector database written in Rust.
Primary crate: `crates/sparrow-core`. Server binary: `crates/sparrow-container`.

## Key concepts

SparrowDB stores nodes and edges (graph) alongside embedding vectors (HNSW index) in a single LMDB environment.
Queries are written in HQL (HelixQL), compiled to named handlers, and called over HTTP.
The server is single-writer / many-reader; write operations are serialised through a dedicated thread.

## Authentication

Named API tokens with three roles: admin, read_write, read_only.
Tokens stored as SHA-256 hashes in a separate LMDB env at `{data_parent}/auth/`.
Auth self-disables when no tokens exist (dev mode).
`SPARROW_API_KEY` env var is seeded as an admin token on startup for backward compatibility.
Pass token as `x-api-key` request header.
Full guide: docs/auth.md

## HTTP API surface

All requests: `Content-Type: application/json`, `x-api-key: <token>` (when auth is enabled).
Base: `http://localhost:6969` (default port; override with `SPARROW_PORT`).

Compiled query endpoint:
  POST /<QueryName>          — run a named compiled HQL query

Schema:
  GET  /introspect           — return schema JSON

HelixDB v1 compatibility:
  POST /v1/query             — accepts HelixDB JSON DSL, translated to SparrowDB ops

Token management (admin role required):
  GET    /tokens             — list all tokens
  POST   /tokens             — create token; body: {"name":"<str>","role":"admin|read_write|read_only"}
  DELETE /tokens/{id}        — revoke by 8-char short ID

Vector operations (built-in, POST /<name>):
  vector_soft_delete         — mark vector deleted, exclude from search
  vector_hard_delete         — delete vector record (HNSW not updated)
  rebuild_vector_index       — rebuild HNSW from scratch, purge soft-deleted
  purge_soft_deleted         — reclaim storage without HNSW rebuild

Diagnostics (built-in, no request body):
  diagnostics                — node/edge/vector counts
  hnsw_health                — BFS reachability across HNSW graph
  hnsw_integrity             — bidirectional edge symmetry check

Dev-instance only (GET):
  /nodes-edges, /nodes-by-label, /node-connections, /node-details

Full reference: docs/HTTP_API.md

## Error codes

401 INVALID_API_KEY  — missing or wrong x-api-key
403 FORBIDDEN        — token valid but role insufficient
404 NOT_FOUND        — query name, node, or label not found
500 GRAPH_ERROR      — storage or traversal failure
500 VECTOR_ERROR     — HNSW / vector index failure

## Schema migrations

Transitions declared via `#[sparrow_migration]` macro and collected with `inventory`.
`run_schema_migrations` runs at startup, applies pending transitions in version order.
Migration log stored in `_migrations_log` LMDB database; crash-safe (marks InProgress before writing).
CLI: `sparrow migrate status|apply|list`
Full design: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-22-schema-migrations-design.md

## CLI commands

sparrow start <name>           — start an instance (Docker)
sparrow stop <name>            — stop an instance
sparrow run                    — run server binary directly (no Docker)
sparrow push <name>            — compile and push HQL queries
sparrow data snapshot|clone|restore — database backup and restore
sparrow migrate status|apply|list   — schema migration management
sparrow upgrade                — interactive v1→v2 project migration wizard

## Crate layout

crates/sparrow-core            — database engine, gateway, query execution
crates/sparrow-container       — server binary (wraps sparrow-core)
crates/sparrow-cli             — `sparrow` CLI tool
crates/sparrow-macros          — proc-macros (#[sparrow_migration], etc.)
crates/sparrow-metrics         — metrics and event logging
crates/sparrow-memory          — episodic memory store (in development)
crates/sparrow-studio          — embedded web UI (React, served via rust-embed)
sdks/rust                      — Rust client SDK
sdks/ts                        — TypeScript client SDK

## Feature flags (sparrow-core)

lmdb        — LMDB storage backend + auth (default)
compiler    — HQL compiler (pest-based)
vectors     — HNSW vector index
server      — build + compiler + vectors + reqwest (HTTP embedding)
dev-instance — debug/visualization endpoints
production  — production build (no debug endpoints)
studio      — embedded Sparrow Studio web UI

## Storage layout (LMDB)

graph_env/          — nodes, edges, secondary indices, BM25, vector index, migration log
auth/               — token store (separate environment, never included in snapshots)

## Key source files

crates/sparrow-core/src/sparrow_gateway/gateway.rs          — Axum server, AppState, post_handler
crates/sparrow-core/src/sparrow_gateway/auth/token_store.rs — TokenStore CRUD + verify
crates/sparrow-core/src/sparrow_engine/storage_core/        — LMDB storage engine
crates/sparrow-core/src/sparrow_engine/vector_core/         — HNSW implementation
crates/sparrow-core/src/sparrow_gateway/builtin/            — built-in HTTP handlers
